signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL has already moved into flush territory, so I would rather wait for a clearer reset than force a late trade.
0G has extreme squeeze fuel from deeply negative funding, but the move is already too extended and the liquidity is too poor to trust for a fresh long under veto.
ZEREBRO is already in a flush state and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
RESOLV has upside momentum, but liquidity is too poor and the active veto blocks forcing a fresh long.
STBL is already deep into a liquidation-flush state, so I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
HEMI remains the clearest short on this board because price is still weak while funding is still strongly positive, which leaves the long side crowded.
TNSR has some squeeze fuel from negative funding, but liquidity is too poor and the active veto blocks forcing a fresh long.
LIT is already down hard and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
ZEN is already weak and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
